item.name: Welkin Catfish
item.description:
This catfish is often likened to the night sky due to the smattering of white splotches on its dark scales.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: According to Yok Huy legend, this species came about when one of their forest-dwelling ancestors sought to capture the night sky.
